name: Advanced Proteome Therapeutics Corporation
summary: Advanced Proteome Therapeutics Corporation, through its subsidiary, Advanced Proteome Therapeutics Inc., operates as a biotechnology company in the United States. The company develops and commercializes a platform for the chemical modification of protein therapeutics, primarily antibody-drug conjugates. Its proprietary technology targets delivery of anti-cancer drugs to cancerous tumors. The company is headquartered in Burnaby, Canada.
